_comment: Copy this file to test-config.json and fill in real credentials. test-config.json is gitignored — NEVER commit it.
_doc: See README-SCRAPING.md for instructions on how to obtain each credential.

rexel._comment: JWT obtained from DevTools → Network → any /api/v3/ request → Authorization header (strip 'Bearer ').

bricodepot._comment: Cookies expire after a few hours — see README-SCRAPING.md §Bricodepot. Use the 🍪 button in the prixElek UI to refresh.

materielelectrique._comment: No auth needed — public prices. pageSlug is the URL path on materielelectrique.com (must end with -p-<digits>).
